subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant, firm in the Testament! The letter thou didst write to Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد راسخ میثاق نامه ایکه به آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @unity of governments; political unity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
